Flat concept inventory:
- \textbf{Vision Language Datasets} \textbf{and Benchmarks} | papers: d693253970a5cc75979d6cc9017cda94dd812726; 910b69e67f4906a1578f1598344f917fbbdc00cc; 212732c649d84382f4e74ca047b13f3c835591d7; 7ee862c9de83ded9358deec49e3d5b951d59ca4c; 1f02ba1c6fae779ec3d003340e72eaf82351cfb9; 43dcf4e7f672b58981b885435ce083e6b069bfae; 4898cfa615b4a7fa53387337151b0262d979a9e8; d5c6c58d3c1ce61714079fe906473c0d20918189; 6f2401263efb270a3cd023e0b60e25ac84107b1c; 410c4e32f6f06f803a775b2bce5e3eb2edeb98fa; 28ad018c39d1578bea84e7cedf94459e3dbe1e70; 1e6daad32910eda48493bc43f41a149be87df7bf; a563f823a887b75dd61adc96c556a8bd83c6e4c3; 9695824d7a01fad57ba9c01d7d76a519d78d65e7; 99129092aeeb63a008da1254f23faa41f14c87ff; eea16dfc29f0521dd547e67a84af4ff95a9c5529; 0e8e3d2a2f4413808c7aff7bee6e8e11ec2700d7; d838f425c2e5e7b0fabb4ac108fc3f57bb4a85c0; 1ebcf1884390c28f24b3adaf5a7aba5b9453b48b; 1d9086a0d98d50812c175baa0911472713e399ab; 3aabd69e13f64f10fd210e4e9e6b2e75c0e734d1; c4d62e33cc410e42bbb8f3b66f3f34ce077382a6; c811b7e98b755ab7d34baa466796d00a93f662e7; 7e9d953c92a7666e648d4741a9cb67a977a99731; 2375e447e86f52a35655c3069bcb047e6655eeb8; 8b0977400aa0195a96cd79389e9947bcdc48aa1b
